card.name: Marble Dryad
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, choose up to one that hasn't been chosen — • Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. • Put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. • Sacrifice this creature, then draw a card.

card.name: Transmutation Charm
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) +{W} — Target player gains 3 life. +{U} — Target player draws a card. +{B} — Target player loses 2 life. +{R} — Destroy target artifact. +{G} — Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: And They Shall Know No Fear
card.text: Choose a creature type. Creatures of the chosen type get +1/+0 and gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Another Round
card.text: Exile any number of creatures you control, then return them to the battlefield under their owner's control. Then repeat this process X more times.

card.name: Gideon, Ally of Zendikar
card.text: [+1]: Until end of turn, Gideon becomes a 5/5 Human Soldier Ally creature with indestructible that's still a planeswalker. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to him this turn. [0]: Put a 2/2 white Knight Ally creature token onto the battlefield. [-4]: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control get +1/+1."

card.name: Guardian of the Skies
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, search your library for a basic land card, exile it, then shuffle. As long as an opponent controls more lands than you, you may play that card from exile. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Hero of Goma Fada
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Information Intercept
card.text: Kicker {1}{W} (You may pay an additional {1}{W} as you cast this spell.) If this spell was kicked, create two 1/1 white Rabbit Ally creature tokens. Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {X}, where X is the number of Allies you control.

card.name: Lantern Scout
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, creatures you control gain lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Munda's Vanguard
card.text: Cohort — {T}, Tap an untapped Ally you control: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Retreat to Emeria
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, choose one — • Create a 1/1 white Kor Ally creature token. • Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Secret Rendezvous
card.text: You and target opponent each draw three cards.

card.name: Tamer of the Tower
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {T}, Remove five counters from this creature: Create a 5/5 white Dragon Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Unified Front
card.text: Converge — Create a 1/1 white Kor Ally creature token for each color of mana spent to cast this spell.

card.name: Vanquish the Horde
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature on the battlefield. Destroy all creatures.

card.name: Copica, the Mirror Blade
card.text: When Copica enters, create a 1/1 white Kor Ally creature token, then attach Copica to it. Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to an opponent, you may create a token that's a copy of it. Equip {3}{U} ({3}{U}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Drake Rider
card.text: Flying Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, scry 1. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, draw a card instead.

card.name: Elite Sky-Rider
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, creatures you control gain flying until end of turn.

card.name: Familiar's Ruse
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, return a creature you control to its owner's hand. Counter target spell.

card.name: Halimar Excavator
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, target player mills X cards, where X is the number of Allies you control.

card.name: Jwari Shapeshifter
card.text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of an Ally creature on the battlefield.

card.name: Of One Mind
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a Human and a non-Human creature. Draw two cards.

card.name: Reflections of Littjara
card.text: As Reflections of Littjara enters, choose a creature type. Whenever you cast a spell of the chosen type, copy that spell. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Sea Gate Loremaster
card.text: {T}: Draw a card for each Ally you control.

card.name: Black Market Dispatcher
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Crippling Fear
card.text: Choose a creature type. Creatures that aren't of the chosen type get -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Deserter's Retribution
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Choose one — • Ally creatures you control gain intimidate until end of turn. (A creature with intimidate can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or creatures that share a color with it.) • Draw two cards.

card.name: Hagra Diabolist
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, you may have target player lose life equal to the number of Allies you control.

card.name: Lethal Scheme
card.text: Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.) Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Each creature that convoked this spell connives. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.)

card.name: Stronghold Arena
card.text: Kicker {G} and/or {W} (You may pay an additional {G} and/or {W} as you cast this spell.) When this enchantment enters, you gain 3 life for each time it was kicked. Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, you may reveal the top card of your library and put it into your hand. If you do, you lose life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Toxinomancer
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, exile the top card of target opponents library face down. For as long as that card remains exiled, you may look at it, you may cast it, and you may spend mana as though it were any type to cast it.

card.name: Zulaport Cutthroat
card.text: Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Alliance Pyromancer
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token.

card.name: Ancient Grudge
card.text: Destroy target artifact. Flashback {G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Calamity of Cinders
card.text: Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.) Calamity of Cinders deals 6 damage to each untapped creature.

card.name: Chasm Guide
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, creatures you control gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Firemantle Mage
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, creatures you control gain menace until end of turn.

card.name: Molten Echoes
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type. Whenever a nontoken creature you control of the chosen type enters, create a token that's a copy of that creature. That token gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Recruit for the Cause
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. Until end of turn, it gains haste, has protection from its owner, and becomes an ally in addition to its other types. (It can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything its owner, and becomes an ally in addition to its other type.)

card.name: Tuktuk Scrapper
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, you may destroy target artifact. If that artifact is put into a graveyard this way, this creature deals damage to that artifact's controller equal to the number of Allies you control.

card.name: Grow from the Ashes
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. If this spell was kicked, instead search your library for two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Harabaz Druid
card.text: {T}: Add X mana of any one color, where X is the number of Allies you control.

card.name: Open the Way
card.text: X can't be greater than the number of players in the game. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal X land cards. Put those land cards onto the battlefield tapped and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Realmwalker
card.text: Changeling (This card is every creature type.) As this creature enters, choose a creature type. You may look at the top card of your library any time. You may cast creature spells of the chosen type from the top of your library.

card.name: Tajuru Warcaller
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, creatures you control get +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Turntimber Ranger
card.text: Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, you may create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Woodland Guide
card.text: Reach Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, this creature explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Elmyr, Frontline Commander
card.text: Vigilance Other creatures you control have vigilance. When Elmyr attacks, you may tap X untapped attacking Allies you control. If you do, search your library for an Ally creature card with mana value X or less and put it onto the battlefield tapped and attacking, then shuffle.

card.name: Inea, the Guiding Hand
card.text: As Inea enters, choose a creature type. If a triggered ability of another permanent you control of the chosen type triggers, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: March from the Tomb
card.text: Return any number of target Ally creature cards with total mana value 8 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Tanni, Sludge Pilferer
card.text: When Tanni enters, surveil X, where X is the number of permanents you control that share a creature type with Tanni. {2}, {T}: The next spell you cast this turn has delve. You may return Tanni to your hand. (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.)

card.name: Cantonment Settler
card.text: Kincraft — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control three or more creatures that share a creature type, each creature you control gets +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Hektor, Heroic Warmonger
card.text: Attacking creatures you control have first strike and lifelink. Whenever Hektor attacks, create a 2/2 white Knight Ally creature token that's tapped and attacking.

card.name: Incandescent Rager
card.text: When this creature enters or attacks, you may pay {BR}{BR} or sacrifice a creature. If you do, rage. (Your rage ends at your upkeep if you didn't deal or receive damage since your last upkeep.) At the beginning of your end step, if you're raging, discard your hand. When you do, exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Ivy Imitation
card.text: Mimic (As this creature enters, choose a creature type. It's the chosen type in addition to it other types.) Whenever one or more other creatures you control enter, if they share a creature type with this creature, add one mana of any color.

card.name: Necrosis Sculptor
card.text: Skulk; mindstrike (Damage dealt by this creature to a player also causes that player to mill that many cards.) Whenever an opponent mills one or more creature cards, you may pay {1}{UB}{UB}. If you do, put up to one creature card milled this way onto the battlefield under your control, except its a 2/2 black Zombie Ally (instead of its other colors and types.)

card.name: Sea Scrap Collector
card.text: When you cast this spell, create your choice of a Treasure token, a Clue token, a Map token or a Fuel token. Rally — Whenever this creature or another Ally you control enters, manufacture. (Create a token that's a copy of an artifact token you control.)

card.name: Alliance Standard
card.text: This artifact enters tapped unless you control a legendary Ally creature. {T}: Add {W}. Cohort — {T}, Tap an untapped Ally you control: Create a 1/1 white Kor Ally creature token.

card.name: Captain's Claws
Gathering Stone
card.text: As this artifact enters, choose a creature type. Spells you cast of the chosen type cost {1} less to cast. When this artifact enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, look at the top card of your library. If it's a card of the chosen type, you may reveal it and put it into your hand. If you don't put the card into your hand, you may put it into your graveyard.

card.name: Jar of Souls
card.text: As this artifact enters, choose a creature type. {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a spell of the chosen type, and that spell can't be countered.

card.name: Patchwork Banner
card.text: As this artifact enters, choose a creature type. Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Prismatic Lens
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Progenitor's Icon
card.text: As this artifact enters, choose a creature type. {T}: Add one mana of any color. {T}: The next spell of the chosen type you cast this turn can be cast as though it had flash.

card.name: Alliance Campsite
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Ally Encampment
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an Ally spell. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Return target Ally you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Blighted Woodland
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {G}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Calmwater Village
card.text: ({T}: Add {U}.) This land enters tapped. {4}{U}, {T}: Draw a card. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each other Town you control.

card.name: Canopy Vista
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Cascading Cataracts
card.text: Indestructible {T}: Add {C}. {5}, {T}: Add five mana in any combination of colors.

card.name: Cinder Glade
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Clifftop Village
card.text: ({T}: Add {R}.) This land enters tapped. {4}{R}, {T}: This land deals 2 damage to target player, planeswalker, or battle. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each other Town you control.

card.name: Crossroads Village
card.text: This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color. {T}: Add one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Deepwood Village
card.text: ({T}: Add {G}.) This land enters tapped. {4}{G}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each other Town you control.

card.name: Eclipsed Steppe
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Escape Tunnel
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Target creature with power 2 or less can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Hillharvest Village
card.text: ({T}: Add {W}.) This land enters tapped. {4}{W}, {T}: Create a 1/1 white Human Peasant token. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each other Town you control.

card.name: Krosan Verge
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest card and a Plains card, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Makeshift Market
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an Ally spell or activate an ability of an Ally source. {5}, {T}: Create a 1/1 white Ally creature token.

card.name: Path of Ancestry
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add on mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1.

card.name: Prairie Stream
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Radiant Summit
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Reflecting Pool
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any type that a land you control could produce.

card.name: Scorched Geyser
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Smoldering Marsh
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Sodden Verdure
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Starting Town
card.text: This land enters tapped unless it's your first, second, or third turn of the game. {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Stillmire Village
card.text: ({T}: Add {B}.) This land enters tapped. {4}{B}, {T}: Put a -1/-1 counter on target creature. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each Town you control.

card.name: Sunken Hollow
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Vernal Fen
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.
